Event: The Underwater Adventure
Event Date: 01/05/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: AM134


Other locations the gear can be found
Donkey
Red Dragon
Coral Magic Amulet

For the duration of the battle, the incoming healing of allies in a small radius around the unit is increased by 30%, and the incoming healing of enemies in a small radius around the unit is reduced by 30%.

Once in a while, the incoming healing of allies in a large radius around the unit increases by 50% for 5 sec, and the incoming healing of enemies in a large radius around the unit decreases by 50% for 5 sec. Additionally, the amulet wearer restores 135000 health to all allies in a large radius around themself fot 5 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
